## Bug Description

## Steps to Reproduce

2. Click on '...'
3. See error

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior
What actually happened.

## Environment

- Open MPlayer Version: [e.g., 1.0]
- Video Format: [e.g., MP4, MKV]
